name: Caramelized Pears
recipeInstructions:
1. In a sauté pan on medium heat, melt the butter.
2. Stir in the sugar and let it simmer, stirring occasionally, until it starts to turn golden brown and caramelizes.
3. Add the brandy and lemon juice to the pan, and continue to simmer to incorporate them.
4. Add the pear slices and cook slowly until they are tender and have caramelized.
Yield: 4 servings
